decision.summary: Proceed only with helper/headless work and named, fixture-backed adapter-slice candidates. Do not pursue broad Codex/Cafex replacement from current evidence.

unsupportedSurfaces: live TUI and credentialed model runtime
license/distribution for bundled or binary release
securityLicensingNotes: Process execution, sandbox permission, diagnostics redaction, and mutation paths remain fail-closed fixture-backed surfaces.
Real OS sandbox enforcement and live host-effect ownership remain native/future boundaries.
JSONL/plain-file state is accepted only for current fixture-backed helper/headless evidence; persistent state replacement requires SQLite/sqlx or equivalent production persistence parity.
Tool registry lookup is accepted only as fixture metadata evidence; real MCP transport, OAuth, resource reads, and execution remain unsupported.
haxe.rust is GPL-3.0; upstream Codex and Cafex are Apache-2.0. Local experiment may continue, but release/bundling requires license review.
No production default may change without a later decision record and rollback drill.

stateBackendDecision.selectedSliceRule: JSONL is sufficient unless the named slice claims persistent goal, runtime, or app-server state parity.
stateBackendDecision.broadReplacementRequirement: SQLite/sqlx or equivalent production persistence parity is required before broad replacement review.

toolRegistryDecision.broadReplacementRequirement: Real MCP transport and app-server parity are required before broad replacement review.

goCriteriaForSelectedSlice: Selected seam-ledger rows are supported with implementation, fixture, and harness evidence.
Adjacent unsupported seams have fail-closed diagnostics or explicit native owner.
Cafetera contract subset for the selected slice passes or has accepted not-applicable records.
Operator rollback path is documented and tested for the slice.
Any haxe.rust compiler gap is generic, upstreamable, and tracked outside codexhx-specific compiler behavior.
noGoCriteriaForBroadReplacement: Seven Cafex seam rows remain unsupported.
Cafetera contract subset has five gaps and no production replacement claim.
The haxe.io.Path.directory stdlib-lowering caveat remains unresolved or unaccepted.
No broad upstream test parity or rollback drill evidence exists.
rollbackDowngradePath: Use helper-only mode if selected adapter-slice evidence regresses.
Route live Cafetera/Cafex workflows back to upstream Codex or the Cafex fork.
Revert any experimental integration commit and run bd sync plus git push.
Delete generated output directories; do not migrate production state.
